nasb.text: For the whole Law is fulfilled in one word, in the statement, “You shall love your neighbor as yourself.”

esv.text: For the whole law is fulfilled in one word: “You shall love your neighbor as yourself.”

cnv.text: 因為全部的律法，都在“愛人如己”這一句話裡面成全了。

ccb.text: 因为全部的律法可以总结成一句话：“要爱邻如己”。

csbs.text: 因为全部律法都在“要爱邻如己”这一句话里得以满足了。
